ab: doo myali kisodame mosoa na payso?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: wadoo ’angipiyamiso na payso?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: maimoo kake wamece na payso, doo myali kisodame mosoa na payso?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: iamece kake na payso!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: maimoo kake wamece na payso, doo myali kisodame mosoa na payso?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ’ayni, paelela ko kisodamiso koa na payso ka isaviviila koso koa.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: doo myali kisodame na kopingiso?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: e’e, ’angkakammane malra.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: doo myali kisodame na solatiso?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: pasodamenga kake ’Ipolane.
en: B: I lent it to 'Ipolo.

ab: kibaka myaso pasodama nakoa na tawngatingi so?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: e’e, makasi nosi’a ka swaviviiya bwa’ay koa.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: wada’olo iamece kake na kongokongo, kibaka myaso pasodame nakoa na kongokongo?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: sesesane nakoa na kongokongo, tatakaese sikongokongo!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: kikay sosolate ka pasodamiso nakoa ko alalaane. ko savivii bwa’ay mosoa.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: ko ’apicengele yaniso na solate ka ’apobaka nakoa.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: nogiyane no swaviviili na paysoiso?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: ipoingaw, no ’ikaysonga na payso ka laso savivii koa.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候在還我。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: nogiyane no soaviviiso nakoa bwa’ay na payso?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: savivii mikake mosoa no si’a.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: nogiyane no soaviviiso nakoa bwa’ay na solate?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: ko si’a ka no swaviviilinga mosoa?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: kikay ’ingpice ka pasodamini nyani mosoa ki Tanobake?
en: A: Did Tanobake lend you this pen?

ab: esi, kisodamili nyane sesane.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: kikay ’ingpice ka kyasodame nyaso Tanobakane?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Tanobake?

ab: ’aini, kikay ka langaini ki titina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: kadrowa ka timoso, mwa kisodame moinoane ’angititi’ici na timoso.
en: A: We're out of salt, let's go borrow some from Moino.

ab: e’e, kowa kisodame.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: mwamaitikaykay Moinoane saviviiya koa na paysoili.
en: B: Go tell Moino to give me my money back.

ab: ’angipiyani pokiyame mosoa na payso?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
